data.title: Balancing Near-Term Margin Pressure With Long-Term Growth: Why Braze Remains a Buy
data.description:
William Blair analyst Arjun Bhatia has maintained their bullish stance on BRZE stock, giving a Buy rating today.

Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Arjun Bhatia has given his Buy rating due to a combination of factors that remain favorable despite modest model changes. After revisiting his forecasts, he reduced fourth-quarter gross margin assumptions by roughly 180 basis points to better reflect the seasonal spike in lower-margin messaging volumes during the holiday period.

Even with this adjustment, he kept his full-year projections for 2026 through 2028 intact, indicating confidence that Braze’s long-term growth and profitability trajectory is unchanged. This balance between near-term margin realism and stable out-year estimates underpins his view that the stock continues to offer attractive upside potential for investors.

According to TipRanks, Bhatia is an analyst with an average return of -6.1% and a 38.82% success rate. Bhatia covers the Technology sector, focusing on stocks such as InterDigital, ServiceNow, and Atlassian.

In another report released today, Stifel Nicolaus also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a $40.00 price target.
